summaries.content: Detail-oriented Software Engineer with expertise in building full-stack web applications, RESTful APIs, and scalable backend architectures. Proven ability to optimize application performance and deploy robust solutions using modern technologies such as React, Node.js, and SQL databases.

Hardware and Embedded Systems Engineer with hands-on experience in FPGA development, digital circuit design, and ASIC flow. Skilled in RTL design using Verilog/VHDL, and experienced in validating complex architectures including pipelined processors and cryptographic accelerators.

items.title: Diagnostics & Maintenance
items.description: Troubleshot workstations and network equipment; performed firmware updates and preventive maintenance.

items.title: Documentation
items.description: Created systematic troubleshooting documentation to streamline hardware issue resolution.

items.title: Root Cause Analysis
items.description: Investigated and isolated hardware faults using systematic debugging, performing firmware updates and maintenance.

items.title: Documentation
items.description: Created automated troubleshooting workflows to streamline issue resolution.

items.title: Full-Stack Development
items.description: Designed and built a custom ERP application using React.js, Express.js, and PostgreSQL to replace legacy spreadsheet-based workflows.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Developed and enhanced company's official website using Next.js, optimized SEO for Google search rankings, and integrated ecommerce features for online product sales.

items.title: Desktop Deployment
items.description: Packaged the ERP application with Electron for local server deployment, enabling reliable offline operation.

items.title: Full-Stack Development
items.description: Built custom ERP web application using React.js and PostgreSQL to replace legacy spreadsheet-based business processes.

items.title: Frontend Engineering
items.description: Designed responsive user interface with Redux state management and RESTful API integration.

items.title: Deployment
items.description: Configured Electron-based desktop deployment for local server usage.

items.title: Database Design
items.description: Designed PostgreSQL database schema to structure customer, supplier, and inventory data for ERP application.

items.title: Data Analysis
items.description: Implemented reporting features to analyze sales trends and inventory status.

items.title: Core Architecture
items.description: Engineered a 32-bit 5-stage pipelined processor in VHDL, supporting a custom ISA of over 25 instructions.

items.title: Hazard Resolution
items.description: Optimized throughput by implementing Hazard Detection and Data Forwarding units to resolve control and data dependencies.

items.title: Verification
items.description: Validated functional correctness through rigorous simulation and testbench environments in QuestaSim.

items.title: Architecture
items.description: Designed a synthesizable 2D convolution accelerator using Systolic Arrays and fully pipelined dataflow to maximize MAC throughput.

items.title: Memory Hierarchy
items.description: Implemented DMA-based loading and dual-port SRAM buffering to support up to 16x16 kernel execution.

items.title: Physical Design
items.description: Executed RTL-to-GDSII synthesis using OpenLane2, validating physical feasibility and achieving timing closure.

items.title: Core Logic
items.description: Synthesized robust AES cryptographic core in Verilog HDL supporting 128-bit, 192-bit, and 256-bit key standards.

items.title: Datapath
items.description: Engineered hardware-optimized modules for SubBytes, ShiftRows, MixColumns, and AddRoundKey transformations.

items.title: Validation
items.description: Verified cryptographic correctness against standard NIST test vectors using rigorous debug tracing.

items.title: System Integration
items.description: Developed browser-controlled robotics suite integrating AI computer vision with low-latency hardware control.

items.title: Firmware
items.description: Programmed ESP32 microcontrollers to handle WebSocket communication for real-time motor control and telemetry.

items.title: Backend Processing
items.description: Deployed YOLOv5 and OpenCV on host server to process visual feedback and automate robotic decision-making.

items.title: Real-Time Messaging System
items.description: Engineered a low-latency WebSocket communication layer to integrate a web dashboard with embedded hardware.

items.title: Reliability
items.description: Ensured reliable message delivery and system synchronization between the browser interface and the robotic unit.

items.title: Architecture
items.description: Built scalable social platform using Microservices principles, React.js, and TypeScript.

items.title: Frontend
items.description: Implemented responsive UI design and asynchronous API integration via AJAX.

items.title: DevOps
items.description: Established CI/CD pipelines and containerized services using Docker for consistent deployment.

items.title: Scalable Microservices Architecture
items.description: Designed a distributed system using Microservices and TypeScript to decouple services and ensure scalability.

items.title: DevOps Automation
items.description: Implemented CI/CD pipelines and Docker to automate testing and reliable delivery of services.

items.title: Stack
items.description: Next.js (TypeScript), Redux Toolkit, Laravel 11, and MySQL.

items.title: Functionality
items.description: Implemented secure authentication (Sanctum), shopping cart logic, real-time order processing, and administrative analytics dashboard.

items.title: Deployment
items.description: Deployed corporate website utilizing Next.js framework and TypeScript.

items.title: Performance
items.description: Maximized performance via Server-Side Rendering (SSR) and strict static typing for reliability.

projects.name: Company Manager App -- Al Nada Scientific Office

items.title: Tech Stack
items.description: React.js, Redux, Express.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, Electron for desktop deployment.

items.title: Business Solution
items.description: Developed ERP application for Al Nada Scientific Office managing customers, suppliers, inventory, and sales records.

items.title: Deployment
items.description: Packaged application with Electron for local server deployment, enabling offline usage.

items.title: Core Features
items.description: Architected content platform with CRUD capabilities, rich-text editing (Quill), and secure image handling (Multer).

projects.name: Interactive Orrery -- NASA Space Apps Hackathon

items.title: Hackathon Project
items.description: Developed during NASA Space Apps Challenge 2024, simulating orbital mechanics and near-Earth object trajectories using React.js and Three.js.

items.title: Pipeline
items.description: Constructed end-to-end restoration pipeline: Denoising, Deblurring, and Inpainting.

items.title: Algorithms
items.description: Applied Telea (FMM) inpainting and deep learning models to restore damaged historical photographs.

items.title: Performance
items.description: Benchmarked pathfinding algorithms (A*, Dijkstra, RRT) analyzing computational complexity and execution time.

items.title: Game Logic
items.description: Developed a real-time, multiplayer arcade game using x86 Assembly and the MASM assembler.

items.title: System Control
items.description: Directly manipulated video memory for low-latency graphics rendering and managed hardware interrupts to handle real-time I/O.

items.title: Simulation
items.description: Modeled combat scenarios using custom data structures to simulate fleet mechanics and collision detection.

items.title: Application
items.description: Built desktop drawing application with shape tools, color fills, and interactive game modes.

items.title: Design
items.description: Applied OOP principles using polymorphism for extensible shape classes and Stack-based Undo/Redo system.

items.title: Portfolio Platform Development
items.description: Engineered comprehensive web platform featuring workshop and event management systems with admin dashboard for content creation, role-based access control enabling instructors to upload course materials and students to register for workshops and events.

items.title: Portfolio Platform Development
items.description: Developed comprehensive platform with event pages, admin dashboard for event creation, role-based access for instructors and students, location management, event galleries, and statistical analysis pages.

items.title: HR Management & Judging System
items.description: Built HR system managing team attendance with custom form builder and reviewer functionality similar to Google Forms, alongside event judging system for evaluating and assessing teams applying to events.

items.title: Mentorship
items.description: Led peer tutoring initiative in electronics, achieving measurable academic improvement.

items.title: Orrery App
items.description: Developed an interactive orrery app visualizing near-Earth objects using React and Three.js.
